interventions.label: Quit Smoking
interventions.description: Structured cessation program with counselling support

interventions.label: Regular Exercise
interventions.description: 150+ min moderate aerobic activity per week (3–4 sessions)

interventions.label: Dietary Change
interventions.description: Mediterranean-style diet — meal prep and planning time included

interventions.label: Weight Loss Program
interventions.description: Structured program combining exercise and diet for 10%+ BMI reduction

interventions.label: Reduce Alcohol
interventions.description: Limit to under 14 units per week with behavioural support

interventions.label: Blood Pressure Treatment
interventions.description: Monthly GP visits for monitoring and medication management

interventions.label: Cholesterol Medication
interventions.description: Statin therapy with quarterly blood tests

interventions.label: Stress Management
interventions.description: Weekly therapy or mindfulness sessions (CBT or similar)

interventions.label: Sleep Improvement
interventions.description: Sleep hygiene programme — consistent schedule and environment adjustments

interventions.label: CPAP Therapy
interventions.description: Continuous positive airway pressure device for sleep apnea — clinic setup and follow-up

interventions.label: Diabetes Prevention Programme
interventions.description: Structured 9-month lifestyle intervention for pre-diabetes risk

interventions.label: Cardiac Rehabilitation
interventions.description: Supervised exercise and education programme for cardiovascular risk

interventions.label: Antiplatelet Therapy
interventions.description: Low-dose aspirin — monthly prescription review

interventions.label: Kidney Protection Protocol
interventions.description: Regular nephrology check-ups, medication and low-sodium diet plan

interventions.label: Liver-Protective Diet
interventions.description: Low-fat, low-sugar dietary plan targeting fatty liver disease

interventions.label: Pulmonary Rehabilitation
interventions.description: Breathing exercises and conditioning programme for COPD management

interventions.label: Metformin (Pre-Diabetes)
interventions.description: Oral medication for insulin resistance — monthly GP review

interventions.label: Anti-Inflammatory Diet
interventions.description: Omega-3 and antioxidant-rich diet with weekly meal planning

interventions.label: Nicotine Replacement Therapy
interventions.description: Patches, gum or spray to support smoking cessation

interventions.label: Full Lifestyle Overhaul
interventions.description: Comprehensive programme: personal trainer, dietitian, and therapist — 10h/week commitment
